site.title: Claude Code Swarm Orchestration Skill
site.description: Complete guide to multi-agent coordination with TeammateTool, Task system, and orchestration patterns
site.author: kieranklaassen

absence_patterns: No convergence or quality verification of agent outputs
No compaction handling or state persistence for long-running teams
No discussion of agent stalling or context exhaustion
No cost or token budget considerations
No treatment of cross-session team persistence
key_claims: TeammateTool enables persistent multi-agent teams with inbox messaging
Three spawn backends (in-process, tmux, iterm2) serve different visibility needs
Task dependency auto-unblocking creates declarative pipelines
Subagents and teammates serve different coordination patterns
Write is preferable to broadcast for team communication
Six patterns cover most multi-agent coordination needs
